about.title: About Us
about.storyText: Biryani Spot Restaurant was founded in 2010 with a simple mission: to bring authentic Hyderabadi flavours to every table. What started as a small family kitchen has grown into a beloved restaurant trusted by over 50,000 customers.
about.missionText: We source the finest spices from across the subcontinent, use time-honoured recipes passed down through generations, and prepare every dish with passion and care.
